title: JT Method, Spel Class
description: Returns the status of the most recent Jump, Jump3, or Jump3CP instruction for the current robot.
see_also:
Jump

Jump3

Jump3CP

Sense

Till

JT Example

Dim status As Integer

With m_spel

  .Till("Sw(1) = On")

  .Jump("P1 Till")

  If .JT() And 4 = 4 Then

   MessageBox.Show("Motion stopped during decent")
 EndIf

End With
examples:
Dim status As Integer

With m_spel .Till("Sw(1) = On") .Jump("P1 Till") If .JT() And 4 = 4 Then
   MessageBox.Show("Motion stopped during decent") EndIf
End With
